metadata.name: Asoloth
metadata.author: hyperbolic
metadata.description: You wake in a wild land with little more than a handful of heavy sticks, river rocks, and a few spells. Something is stirring beneath the sea-cliffs of the far northeastern isle — and the longer it wakes, the darker Asoloth grows. Will you be the one to end the wyrm, or will you be its next bed of bones?

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Larian
towns.description: A weatherworn market town at the heart of Asoloth. Caravaneers hawk wares, a shrine stands at its eastern quarter, and rumors move faster than the rain.

dungeons.name: Goblin Stronghold
dungeons.description: A mossy keep seized by goblin raiders.

dungeons.name: Derelict Caves
dungeons.description: Old forgotten ruins north of town.

dungeons.name: Orc Headquarters
dungeons.description: An orc warren with something darker pulling its strings.

dungeons.name: Citadel of the Sun
dungeons.description: A ruined island temple that hides the Sun Sword.

dungeons.name: Dragon's Lair
dungeons.description: A shattered keep above the ancient wyrm's sleeping-pit.

key_dungeons.name: Dragon's Lair
key_dungeons.description: A shattered keep on the far northeastern isle. The cliffs smoke, the surf steams where it strikes the shore — something ancient sleeps below.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Descend the Dragon's Lair, slay the wyrm, and return with the Dragonheart
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The Sage in Larian said the Sun Sword is the only blade worthy of the task.
